description: Develop granular consent options for users to manage their data tracking preferences, particularly for cross-device tracking and data sharing.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses consent settings WHEN they adjust their preferences THEN their choices are saved and respected.

description: Prepare for a full GDPR compliance audit by addressing key concerns such as lawful data processing, consent mechanisms, and data retention policies.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the compliance audit is initiated WHEN the necessary documentation is prepared THEN all key concerns are addressed.

description: Implement a data ingestion pipeline that captures detailed user behavior metrics including browsing history, click patterns, scroll depth, and time-on-page metrics for each authenticated user.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user is authenticated WHEN they browse content THEN their behavior metrics are captured in real-time.

description: Build a recommendation engine that utilizes user profile data to serve personalized content suggestions, incorporating collaborative filtering and content-based approaches.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN user profile data is available WHEN the recommendation engine processes this data THEN it provides personalized content suggestions.

description: Establish monitoring and alerting for user engagement metrics to ensure the recommendation engine is performing effectively.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN user engagement metrics are tracked WHEN a significant drop occurs THEN an alert is triggered.

description: Create an API and batch export system to share anonymized user profile segments with advertising partners, ensuring compliance with privacy regulations.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN user segments are ready WHEN the export system is triggered THEN anonymized data is shared with advertisers.

description: Create a user-facing dashboard that displays collected behavioral data, inferred interests, and engagement patterns, allowing users to opt out of specific tracking categories.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses their dashboard WHEN they view their data THEN they can see their inferred interests and opt out of tracking.

description: Implement cross-device tracking to link user activity across mobile and web sessions, ensuring a unified user profile.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user logs in on multiple devices WHEN they interact with content THEN their activity is linked in their profile.

story_title: Implement A/B testing for recommendation engine
description: Conduct A/B testing on different recommendation algorithms to measure their impact on Content CTR and user engagement.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN different recommendation algorithms are tested WHEN A/B tests are conducted THEN the impact on Content CTR is measured.

description: Implement a system for collecting user feedback on content recommendations to continuously improve the recommendation engine.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user interacts with recommendations WHEN they provide feedback THEN their input is recorded for analysis.
